_comment: Supertrend bot. Per strategy set: name, account, direction, symbols, bar_size, market_hours (RTH|ETH|24H), supertrend(atr_period,multiplier), dema_filter, optional adx_filter/rsi_filter/macd_filter, sizing.fixed_stocks. Futures: add sec_type=FUT, exchange, currency. Everything else (hist_duration, entry_window, order/exec params, poll, logs) is derived or defaulted in code.
_momentum_filters_comment: Optional momentum filters gate entries so momentum agrees with the Supertrend direction (on TOP of dema/adx). rsi_filter: LONG only when RSI(period)>long_min, SHORT only when RSI<short_max (shorthand "rsi":50). macd_filter: LONG only when MACD hist>0, SHORT only when hist<0. Backtests show RSI>50/<50 improves win rate + drawdown on 30m/1h. Example: "rsi_filter": {"enabled": true, "period": 14, "long_min": 50, "short_max": 50}, "macd_filter": {"enabled": true, "fast": 12, "slow": 26, "signal": 9}
_direction_options: long_only = long when bullish, cash when bearish (never short). short_only = short when bearish, cash when bullish (never long). long_short = always in the market: long when bullish, flip to short when bearish. (Shorting equities needs a borrowable/shortable symbol + margin; futures short natively.)
_regime_filter_comment: REGIME-ADAPTIVE gate (Choppiness Index + ADX, hysteresis). TREND: enter on Supertrend. CHOP: chop_action = 'stand_aside' (no new entries), 'momentum' (require rsi+macd), or 'mean_revert' (TIER-2, v2 only). Flip TREND when CHOP<chop_trend AND ADX>adx_trend; flip CHOP when CHOP>chop_range; else hold.
_mean_revert_comment: TIER-2 mean-reversion (v2). Active ONLY when regime_filter.enabled AND chop_action='mean_revert'. In CHOP it FADES Bollinger-band extremes back to the mean: LONG when percent_b<=entry_pb (at/below lower band) AND (if require_rsi) RSI<=rsi_oversold; SHORT when percent_b>=1-entry_pb AND RSI>=rsi_overbought. Fixed stop = stop_atr_mult*ATR(atr_period) BEYOND the band (never trailed). Take-profit = the Bollinger basis. Also exits on a regime flip back to TREND or after max_hold_bars. Counter-trend (side is independent of the Supertrend) but honours `direction`. Trend entries stand aside in CHOP; normal Supertrend entries resume in TREND. A 'mean_revert' block is INERT unless chop_action is set to 'mean_revert' — the MES strategy below keeps 'stand_aside' for A/B comparison.
